title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti tells Angoori that is mad and she would be in a fix if he fell for another woman in London. A worried Angoori agrees to go to London with Manmohan after speaking to her mother-in-law.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti compliments Angoori on her cooking prowess; a dog comes close to Vibhuti to urinate, which makes Manmohan laugh, and it ends up biting both of them.
